name: absmartly-mcp
description: Full access to the ABsmartly experimentation platform — 230+ commands across 33 groups including experiment lifecycle, metrics, goals, teams, and feature flags.

absmartly_endpoint.title: ABsmartly API Endpoint
absmartly_endpoint.description: Your ABsmartly instance URL (e.g., https://demo-1.absmartly.com or https://your-company.absmartly.com)

tools.name: discover_commands
tools.description: Browse available command groups or search by keyword

tools.name: get_command_docs
tools.description: Get detailed documentation for a specific command

tools.name: execute_command
tools.description: Execute any ABsmartly command with typed parameters
